name: ACE Cash Express
description_short: At 6219 Brooklyn Blvd, Brooklyn Center, MN 55429, you can find ACE Cash Express. Call +1 763-535-6872.
description_long: ACE Cash Express is an established financial services company operating multiple brick-and-mortar locations across the United States, with a significant presence in states like Colorado and Louisiana. The company positions itself as a convenient alternative to traditional banking for consumers needing immediate cash access and financial services. ACE offers a range of financial products including installment loans, title loans, check cashing, bill payments, money transfers, and tax services, targeting consumers who need fast access to funds or basic financial services outside traditional banking hours. The company emphasizes accessibility through physical store locations and online loan options, with customer service available via phone and email. ACE distinguishes itself through its multi-service model, combining emergency lending with check cashing and other financial services in a single location, appealing to underbanked consumers. However, the company's specific loan terms, APR rates, and eligibility requirements are not disclosed on the accessible website pages, limiting transparency. The website also shows state-specific limitations ("this type of loan is not available in this state"), indicating that product availability varies by geography. As a payday and title loan lender, ACE serves consumers in financial distress, but potential borrowers should be cautious about high costs typical in this lending category and verify all terms before borrowing.
pros: Multiple service offerings in single locations (installment loans, title loans, check cashing, bill payments, money transfers, tax services)
Online loan options available for qualifying customers seeking remote application
Same-day or next-day funding capability for emergency cash needs
Extensive store network across multiple states including Colorado, Louisiana, and others
Dedicated customer service available via phone (877-ACE-CASH, 866-ACE-CASH) and email
Physical store locations provide face-to-face customer service
Bill payment services integrated with lending products
cons: No APR, interest rates, or loan term details provided on accessible website pages
Product availability restricted by state (website confirms certain products unavailable in specific states)
Website 404 errors prevent full review of service details and terms
Title loans and installment loans typically carry high costs and predatory risk
No disclosure of typical loan amounts, repayment terms, or borrowing costs
best_for: Consumers needing immediate cash access ($100-$1,000 range) for emergencies
Individuals with vehicle titles seeking collateral-based loans
Unbanked or underbanked consumers needing check cashing and money transfer services
Customers requiring multiple financial services (loans, bill pay, money transfer) in one location
diagnosis: ACE Cash Express is best for consumers facing genuine emergencies who need fast access to small amounts of cash and lack better alternatives through traditional banking. The main caveat is that specific loan terms and costs are not transparently disclosed on the website, and as a title/payday lender, ACE's products typically carry substantially higher costs than traditional loans—borrowers should carefully review all terms, understand total repayment costs, and consider alternatives before committing.
